query_summary.intent: Fix lint.sh Check 15 (excessive empty lines) and run full lint
key_findings: 🐛 BUG: Check 15 had duplicate 'done < <(find...)' causing syntax error — FIXED by removing duplicate
🐛 BUG: python3 << PYEOF "$f" treats $f as executable FILE, not arg to stdin script — FIXED with inline python3 -c
🐛 BUG: set -euo pipefail kills script when grep -c returns exit code 1 (no matches) — FIXED with || true
✅ Check 15 now works: detects 3+ consecutive newlines, auto-fixes to exactly one blank line
✅ Found and fixed 2 files with excessive empty lines via auto-fix

recent_activity: 2026-07-07 debug | lint-check15: fixed duplicate done in while loop, replaced python3 heredoc+arg with inline -c
2026-07-07 fix | lint-grep-c: added || true to grep -c '^    {' to prevent set -euo pipefail exit on 0 matches
